channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月8日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 StreetComplete: Fixing OpenStreetMap, one tiny quest at a time #2 A better way to tie your gym shorts. (Or any drawstring) [video] #3 Better Auth is joining Vercel #4 Microsoft Fire IdTech Team at Id Software #5 98% Isn't Much #6 Chat Control passed first round in EU Parliament #7 Europe's company websites are mostly served by US vendors #8 Top researchers leave USA for the Netherlands (in Dutch) #9 Show HN: PostgreSQL performance and cost across 23 EC2 instance types #10 But Nothing Has Changed on Our Side
